overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark industrial Arasaka facility from Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks through metal corridors, enters a red-lit cybernetics room containing a medical chair and server racks, then exits toward a brightly lit white room. The footage features high-fidelity game engine graphics with dramatic neon lighting and industrial aesthetics.

green military-style storage crates with white Arasaka corporation branding
large cylindrical metal support pillar with rusted orange-brown coloration
dark doorway emitting intense red light from the room beyond

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit industrial corridor with metal flooring. To the right are green Arasaka-branded military crates, while a metal staircase with red railings dominates the center. The camera moves steadily forward toward a mysterious doorway glowing with red light at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: cybernetics laboratory with red ambient lighting

events.description: passes through doorway into intensely red-lit room from dark corridor
moves deeper into room where red lighting creates dramatic patterns on tiled floor

agents.ego_description: entering the red-lit cybernetics room and approaching the medical chair to examine the equipment

entered.detail: futuristic reclining medical chair with white padded sections and black carbon fiber frame
entire wall covered with server racks displaying grids of small blinking white and red lights
rectangular overhead window emitting bright white light into the red room

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dramatically lit room bathed in red neon light. At the center stands a futuristic medical chair for cybernetic procedures, while the left wall is covered entirely with blinking server racks. An overhead skylight provides stark white contrast to the red ambiance as the camera circles the chair.

scene_state.functional_zone: server room with detailed control panels

events.description: turns to examine wall-mounted control panels with purple and red indicator lights

agents.ego_description: examining the server racks and control panels in detail, moving around the perimeter of the red-lit room

entered.detail: wall-mounted technical control panel featuring purple indicator lights and digital displays
large industrial ventilation ducts and piping on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on the technical details of the room, examining server racks with blinking lights and a control panel featuring purple indicators. The medical chair remains visible to the left while the camera pans to show ventilation ductwork overhead, maintaining the intense red neon atmosphere throughout.

events.description: exits the red-lit room back into the darker industrial warehouse area
approaching brightly lit white room, creating stark contrast with the previous red environment

agents.ego_description: exiting the red cybernetics room and walking across the industrial floor toward a brightly lit white doorway

entered.detail: large open area containing industrial equipment, containers, and machinery
doorway leading to a brightly lit white room visible at the end of the industrial floor
large metal storage containers and industrial barriers

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the red-lit room into a darker industrial warehouse floor with scattered machinery and containers. Moving forward, the scene transitions toward a starkly bright white-lit doorway at the far end, creating a dramatic lighting contrast with the previous neon-red environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark industrial facility that transitions from a dim corridor into a neon-red cybernetics lab before ending in a starkly lit warehouse. It begins by moving steadily down a metal corridor past green Arasaka crates and red railings toward a glowing doorway. As the camera enters the room, the environment shifts into a dramatic red neon ambiance centered around a futuristic medical chair and walls of blinking server racks under a contrasting white skylight. The perspective then pans across technical control panels and overhead ventilation ductwork, maintaining the intense red glow before turning to exit the chamber. Finally, the scene opens onto a darker warehouse floor scattered with machinery, moving forward toward a brilliantly white-lit doorway that creates a sharp contrast with the previous neon atmosphere.
